case_title: KATTY A. GUERRA VS. MICHAEL A. DIAZ et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-22-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF KATTY GUERRA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
